text: Standing in this modern, carefully designed space, I feel a sense of anticipation—here, the boundaries between human inquiry and innovation seem to blur. The bright lights, the glass walls, and the vibrant R+D display remind me that we are always on the cusp of discovery. There is a quiet energy—a tension between curiosity and comfort—that urges me to reflect on how environments shape our thinking. I feel both small amid all this innovation, and yet vital, as if my presence and questions have a place here.
